items.definition_en: A festival is a special event with music or shows.
items.example_en: We go to a music festival every summer.

items.definition_en: A parade is a line of people or cars celebrating something.
items.example_en: The children watched the parade on the street.

items.definition_en: A carnival is a fun event with games and rides.
items.example_en: We enjoyed the rides at the carnival.

items.definition_en: Fireworks are bright lights in the sky for celebrations.
items.example_en: We watched fireworks on New Year's Eve.

items.definition_en: A costume is special clothing for an event or party.
items.example_en: Everyone wore a funny costume to the party.

items.definition_en: A parade float is a decorated vehicle in a parade.
items.example_en: Children waved from the parade float.

items.definition_en: A balloon is a light bag filled with air or gas.
items.example_en: They filled the room with colorful balloons.

items.definition_en: A ticket is something you buy to enter an event.
items.example_en: I bought a ticket to the show.

items.definition_en: A booth is a small stand at a festival or event.
items.example_en: We visited the food booth at the festival.

items.definition_en: A crowd surfer is someone lifted over people at a concert.
items.example_en: A crowd surfer passed right in front of the stage.

items.definition_en: Confetti is small pieces of paper thrown at celebrations.
items.example_en: Confetti filled the air after the performance.

items.definition_en: A stage is the area where performers show their act.
items.example_en: The singer walked onto the stage.

items.definition_en: An organizer is a person who plans the event.
items.example_en: The organizer checked the list of performers.

items.definition_en: A tent is a shelter used for outdoor events.
items.example_en: We waited for the show in a big tent.

items.definition_en: A fair is a big outdoor event with food and games.
items.example_en: They spent the afternoon at the county fair.

items.definition_en: A picnic is a meal eaten outside, usually at an event.
items.example_en: We had a picnic during the festival.

items.definition_en: A performer is someone who puts on a show.
items.example_en: The performer amazed the audience with her act.

items.definition_en: A tent pole holds up a large festival tent.
items.example_en: They secured every tent pole before the event started.

items.definition_en: A marquee is a large tent used for events.
items.example_en: The food was served under the main marquee.

items.definition_en: A clown is a funny performer at events and parties.
items.example_en: A clown made everyone laugh at the festival.
